zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Garneys於1508年出生在英國素福爾可簡頓時，她的父親Robert Garneys Esquire30歲，母親Lady Anne Bacon44歲。她於1528年6月14日與Lord James Calthorpe在英國英格蘭素福爾可簡頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年在英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳享年58歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Garneys于1508年出生在英国素福爾可簡頓时，她的父亲Robert Garneys Esquire30岁，母亲Lady Anne Bacon44岁。她于1528年6月14日与Lord James Calthorpe在英国英格兰素福爾可簡頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年在英国諾福爾可金也斯 琳享年58岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Garneys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Garnish
meanings: English: (i) nickname from an unrecorded Old French * garnois, * garneis of uncertain meaning. An adjective related to Old French gernun ‘moustache’ ( see Garnon ) is unlikely in view of the -a- in the Middle English forms. (ii) see Garnes .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Garneys was born in 1508, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, her father, Robert Garneys Esquire, was 30 and her mother, Lady Anne Bacon, was 44. She married Lord James Calthorpe on 14 June 1528, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1566, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Garneys est née en 1508, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Garneys Esquire, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Bacon, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Lord James Calthorpe le 14 juin 1528, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1566, à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Garneys 1508 in Kenton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Garneys Esquire 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Bacon 44. Sie hat am 14. Juni 1528 in Kenton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Lord James Calthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1566 im Alter von 58 Jahren in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Garneys è nata il nel 1508 nel Kenton, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Robert Garneys Esquire, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Bacon, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Lord James Calthorpe il 14 giugno 1528, nel Kenton, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1566, nel King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Garneysが1508年にイギリススフォルクケントンで生まれた時，父Robert Garneys Esquireは30歳，母Lady Anne Baconは44歳であった。1528年6月14日にイギリスイギリススフォルクケントンでLord James Calthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年にイギリスノーフォルクキング'ス リンで58歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Garneys(이)가 1508년 영국 수폴크 켄턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Garneys Esquire(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Bacon(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1528년 6월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 켄턴에서 Lord James Calthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 영국 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Garneys nasceu em 1508, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Garneys Esquire, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Bacon, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord James Calthorpe em 14 de junho de 1528, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1566, em King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Garneys родилась в 1508 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Garneys Esquire было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Bacon, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord James Calthorpe 14 июня 1528 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1566 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Garneys nació en 1508, en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Garneys Esquire, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Bacon, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Lord James Calthorpe el 14 de junio de 1528, en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1566, en King's Lynn, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
